name: MSC INCOME FUND, INC.
business: MSC Income Fund, Inc. is a principal investment firm primarily focused on providing debt capital to private companies owned by or in the process of being acquired by a private equity fund. It also maintains a portfolio of customized long-term debt and equity investments in lower middle market companies. The company has elected to be regulated as a business development company under the Investment Company Act of 1940.
sellsTo: private companies owned by private equity funds
